name: Braised Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the green part of scallion into 2-inch pieces.
2. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except meat, oil, and chicken stock.
3. Heat oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat. Brown beef quickly on all sides.
4. Add the mixture from the bowl and cook, stirring to heat and blend, about 3 minutes.
5. Add chicken stock to the beef and bring to a simmer.
6. Cover and simmer for 90 minutes to 2 hours, or until meat is tender.
7. Slice the meat and serve hot or cold.
8. Reserve gravy for master sauce. Strain through cheesecloth when cool and refrigerate in a covered dish.
